title: PipelineJournal
description: Atomic, single-writer checkpoint file tracking per-phase pipeline status. Mirrored server-side in workflows.pipeline_journal (TEXT). Parent design: §4.7.

schema_version.description: Bumped only for non-backward-compatible shape changes. Forward-migration only; no downgrades.

workflow_id.description: Gateway-assigned workflow ID this journal belongs to.

current_phase.description: Name of the phase currently running, or null when idle.

phases.description: One entry per phase the pipeline has started. Keys are phase names.

pid.description: PID of the writing process while status is 'running'. Dead-PID detection enables crash recovery (FR-005).

iteration.description: 1-based iteration counter for phases that loop (eval, train). Append-only via write_step_iteration.

fields.description: Phase-specific payload (e.g., records_count, grader_version). Free-form; specific phases validate their own shape downstream.
